title: plumeria pudica
intro: Plumeria pudica, also known as the sensitive plumeria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of plumeria pudica include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of plumeria pudica include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
